en: It's different from most of the girls I've been with. So call her up, Romeo.
Why? So I can realize she's not that smart, that she's f****** boring? You know, I mean, you don't...
ko: 왜? 그녀가 그렇게 똑똑하지 않고, 지루하다는 걸 깨닫게 하려고? 너도 알잖아...

en: This girl's, like, f****** perfect right now. I don't want to ruin that.
Maybe you're perfect right now. Maybe you don't want to ruin that.
But I think that's a super philosophy, Will.
ko: 하지만 그건 정말 멋진 철학이야, 윌.

en: That way, you can go through your entire life without ever having to really know anybody.
My wife used to fart when she was nervous.
ko: 내 아내는 긴장할 때 방귀를 뀌곤 했어.

en: She had all sorts of wonderful, amazing, good things. You know, she used to fart in her sleep.
ko: 그녀는 잠을 자면서 방귀를 뀌곤 했어.

en: I'm sorry I shared that with you. One night, it was so loud, it woke the dog up.
Ha, ha, ha, ha, ha, ha, ha.
She woke up and got like, oh, is that you? See, I didn't have the heart to tell her.
Oh, God. And she woke herself up. Yeah. Ha, ha, ha, ha, ha, ha.
Ha, ha, ha, ha, ha, ha, ha.
Oh, Christ. Ah, but, Will, she's been dead two years, and that's the s*** I remember.
ko: 아, 하지만 윌, 그녀는 2년 전에 죽었어.
